chapter_title: About the Forbiddance of Men imitating

hadith_entries.text:
Narrated Ibn Abbas; 'The Messenger of Allah invoked
Allah's curse on the women who assume the masculine
manners and the men who behave effeminately.'
Riyadhos-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
*

Narrated Ibn Abbas; 'The Messenger of Allah
invoked
Allah's curse on the women who assume the masculine
manners and the men who behave effeminately¹³.,
This is the aim of this chapter. And now let us read what
Imam Al-Nawawi compiled in the same concern.]
